narrative.hero_archetype: The Memory Unit — patient, audit-obsessed, never performs
narrative.story_structure: Sits beside dark-research-mcp. dark-research-mcp asks 'what's out there?'; dark-memory-mcp answers 'what have we already learned?' Both are needed; neither replaces the other. Users adopt at their own pace; legacy dark-research-mcp tools stay as deprecated shims, no migration pressure.
key_messages: Dark Memory MCP is a sibling of dark-research-mcp, not a replacement
Coexistence is the deployment model — both install side by side
Every write is audited; every read is scoped; every cache is integrity-checked
SQLite stays as a fallback driver — Postgres is the default for production

compliance.note: Dark Memory MCP is infrastructure code; no user-facing publications; compliance rules do not apply. This field is reserved for future jurisdictions if Dark Memory MCP ever ships user-visible artifacts.
